description: Draft a goal contract, judge it with structured output, and keep refining until the judge says it is ready.

objective.description: the outcome you want the routine to turn into a goal

drafter.instructions: You turn a rough objective into a clear goal contract. You inspect the repo read-only when useful. You write no files.

judge.instructions: You judge whether a goal contract is ready to guide implementation. Return structured JSON only. You write no files.
